functions.name: addAzureContainerRegistry
functions.description: Adds an Azure Container Registry resource to the application model.

functions.name: getAzureContainerRegistry
functions.description: Gets the Azure Container Registry associated with a compute environment resource.

functions.name: withAzureContainerRegistry
functions.description: Configures a compute environment resource to use an Azure Container Registry.

parameters.name: registryBuilder
parameters.description: The resource builder for the `AzureContainerRegistryResource` to use.

functions.name: withContainerRegistryRoleAssignments
functions.description: Adds role assignments to the specified Azure Container Registry resource.

parameters.name: target
parameters.description: The target Azure Container Registry resource.

parameters.name: roles
parameters.description: The Azure Container Registry roles to assign to the resource.

functions.name: withPurgeTask
functions.description: Adds a scheduled ACR purge task to remove old or unused container images from the registry.
functions.signature: withPurgeTask(schedule: string, filter?: string, ago?: timespan, keep?: number, taskName?: string): AzureContainerRegistryResource

parameters.name: schedule
parameters.description: The cron schedule for the purge task timer trigger. Must be a five-part cron expression (`minute hour day-of-month month day-of-week`); seconds are not supported.

parameters.name: filter
parameters.description: An optional filter for the `acr purge --filter` parameter. Only repositories matching this filter will be purged. Defaults to `".*:.*"` (all repositories and tags) when `null`.

parameters.name: ago
parameters.description: The age threshold for `acr purge --ago`. Images older than this duration will be considered for removal. Uses Go-style duration format (e.g., `2d3h6m`). Defaults to `0d` when `null`.

parameters.name: keep
parameters.description: The number of most recent images to keep per repository, regardless of age. Must be greater than zero. Defaults to 3.

parameters.name: taskName
parameters.description: An optional name for the ACR task resource. If not provided, a name is auto-generated based on existing purge tasks to avoid conflicts. If a task with the specified name already exists, an `ArgumentException` is thrown.

capabilities.name: withPurgeTask
capabilities.description: Adds a scheduled ACR purge task to remove old or unused container images from the registry.
capabilities.signature: withPurgeTask(schedule: string, filter?: string, ago?: timespan, keep?: number, taskName?: string): AzureContainerRegistryResource

parameters.name: schedule
parameters.description: The cron schedule for the purge task timer trigger. Must be a five-part cron expression (`minute hour day-of-month month day-of-week`); seconds are not supported.

parameters.name: filter
parameters.description: An optional filter for the `acr purge --filter` parameter. Only repositories matching this filter will be purged. Defaults to `".*:.*"` (all repositories and tags) when `null`.

parameters.name: ago
parameters.description: The age threshold for `acr purge --ago`. Images older than this duration will be considered for removal. Uses Go-style duration format (e.g., `2d3h6m`). Defaults to `0d` when `null`.

parameters.name: keep
parameters.description: The number of most recent images to keep per repository, regardless of age. Must be greater than zero. Defaults to 3.

parameters.name: taskName
parameters.description: An optional name for the ACR task resource. If not provided, a name is auto-generated based on existing purge tasks to avoid conflicts. If a task with the specified name already exists, an `ArgumentException` is thrown.

enumTypes.name: AzureContainerRegistryRole
enumTypes.description: Represents ATS-compatible Azure Container Registry roles.
